name: Team One
description_short: Team One Credit Union is a Michigan-based credit union offering comprehensive banking services including loans, credit cards, and deposit accounts to residents across all Michigan counties.
description_long:
Team One Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Michigan residents and businesses. The credit union has established itself as a significant regional player, having been recognized by Newsweek and Plant-A Insights Group as one of America's Best Regional Credit Unions for three consecutive years. The organization also holds designation as a Juntos Avanzamos credit union, reflecting commitment to Hispanic and Latino community outreach.

Team One offers a full suite of banking and lending products including mortgages (from 5.906% APR), auto loans (from 5.24% APR), personal loans (from 10.74% APR), recreational loans (from 7.50% APR), and credit cards including a Platinum Visa with balance transfer options at rates as low as 8.9% APR. Members can access debt consolidation loans, no-fee balance transfers, online and video banking, multiple payment options, and insurance products through The Family Security Plan. The credit union provides home repair assistance programs and maintains physical branch locations throughout Michigan.

Team One distinguishes itself through multi-channel service delivery (in-branch, mail, digital, video banking across countries), local community investment through its Community Impact Team, partnership with union trades for infrastructure development, and accessibility features including screen-reader compatibility. Their emphasis on fraud prevention and member education, combined with regional awards recognition, positions them as a community-focused financial institution rather than a purely transactional lender.

As a traditional credit union serving a broad geographic area (all Michigan counties), Team One is best suited for established members seeking relationship banking with competitive rates on standard loan products. The main caveat is that credit union membership requirements and account opening procedures are not detailed on the website, so prospective members should verify eligibility and enrollment processes before applying. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Credit cards including Platinum Visa with balance transfer options
Insurance products through The Family Security Plan (whole life, term life, disability, critical illness, accident, hospital sickness)
Home repair assistance and contractor referral services
pros: Recognized as one of America's Best Regional Credit Unions by Newsweek for three consecutive years
Competitive loan rates across all major categories: mortgages from 5.906% APR, auto loans from 5.24% APR, personal loans from 10.74% APR
No balance transfer fees on credit card transfers with rates as low as 8.9% APR on Platinum Visa
Multi-channel service delivery including video banking, online banking, mobile banking, and in-branch options
Community Impact Team providing volunteer service and community engagement programs
Designated Juntos Avanzamos credit union with explicit commitment to Hispanic/Latino community service
Accessible website with screen-reader functionality and compliance features
cons: Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility requirements or account opening procedures
Limited transparency on fees, minimum balances, or account maintenance costs
No information provided about mobile app features, digital banking capabilities, or online account opening process
best_for: Michigan residents seeking competitive rates on mortgages, auto loans, or personal loans with community-focused service
Established borrowers looking for debt consolidation or balance transfer options without transfer fees
Hispanic and Latino community members seeking culturally responsive banking with explicit community commitment
diagnosis: Team One Credit Union is best for Michigan residents seeking traditional credit union banking with competitive rates and community-focused service. The main caveat is that prospective members must verify membership eligibility and understand any associated fees or requirements, which are not detailed on the publicly accessible website.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Michigan-based credit union offering comprehensive banking services including loans, credit cards, and deposit accounts to state residents.
